overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian city street during a nighttime sandstorm with heavy orange atmospheric haze. The scene features neon-lit billboards, swaying palm trees, and futuristic architecture with moderate vehicle traffic and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk during sandstorm

events.description: vehicles with headlights on approach and pass through the intersection
ego steps onto sidewalk from crosswalk, orange guardrails come into view

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk during the storm

notable_agents.action: truck with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the road
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall palm trees swaying in the wind along the street
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city intersection during a nighttime sandstorm with heavy orange haze. The ego crosses the street at a marked crosswalk beneath a traffic light structure, with vehicles passing through the intersection. Tall palm trees and distant skyscrapers are visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with orange safety railings and large advertisements

events.description: large vertical billboard becomes visible through the storm haze

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to orange guardrails

notable_agents.action: person in white tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: bright orange metal safety railings lining the sidewalk edge
tall building-mounted advertisement with SUBSERVICE and REAL WATER text

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk bordered by orange safety railings, the ego passes other pedestrians while a massive vertical billboard emerges through the orange haze on the right. Palm trees line the left side of the path, swaying in the storm winds.

events.description: ground debris and scattered trash becomes visible on the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard reading NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE! with CHOOH2 logo
scattered cardboard and litter on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The ego continues past the large vertical advertisement while approaching a new billboard promoting employment upgrades. The sidewalk shows signs of urban decay with scattered debris, and the orange guardrails continue along the right side of the path.

events.description: passing under bright neon signs and illuminated storefront displays
approaching covered walkway entrance with overhead structure

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated vending machine with glowing display
neon-lit commercial signs including PIPE OVERGUN advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a commercial zone with bright neon signage and illuminated vending machines. The ego passes the large employment billboard and continues past storefronts while approaching a covered walkway entrance. The orange guardrails continue along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with overhead lighting

events.description: entering covered walkway with overhead metal structure and artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered walkway section with overhead protection

entered.detail: overhead metal framework with beams and lighting fixtures providing shelter
bright artificial lights mounted on the overhead structure
large concrete planters containing palm trees lining the walkway
dark metal safety railings replacing the orange guardrails

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a covered pedestrian walkway with an overhead metal structure and bright artificial lighting. The environment becomes more enclosed with large concrete planters containing palm trees on the left and metal railings on the right, providing shelter from the storm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sandstorm-stricken city street that gradually transitions from an open, hazy intersection into a sheltered pedestrian walkway. It begins by crossing a marked intersection beneath traffic lights, where vehicles pass through a thick orange haze that partially obscures distant skyscrapers and swaying palm trees. As the camera moves onto the concrete sidewalk, the view shifts past pedestrians and orange safety railings toward a massive vertical billboard emerging from the storm. The scene then expands into a commercial zone filled with bright neon signage and illuminated vending machines, passing an employment advertisement and scattered urban debris. Finally, the camera moves away from the wind-swept street and enters a covered walkway, where the environment becomes enclosed under a metal structure with bright artificial lighting and concrete planters.
